title: T-022 — UI: sscc_labels_queue_page + sscc_label_preview + sscc_preview_reprint modal (SHIP-019) (11-shipping-e)
prompt:
# T-022 — SSCC Labels Queue UI

PRD: docs/prd/11-SHIPPING-PRD.md §15.4 SHIP-019 SSCC Labels Queue, §13.1, §11 V-SHIP-PACK-04, V-SHIP-LBL-02
UX: prototypes/design/11-SHIPPING-UX.md §3 SHIP-019
Prototypes:
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/pack-screens.jsx:224-314 (sscc_labels_queue_page)
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/pack-screens.jsx:317-336 (sscc_label_preview_component)
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/modals.jsx:702-739 (sscc_preview_reprint_modal)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Server Component page `/(shipping)/labels/sscc` showing SSCC + ZPL print job queue with reprint modal.

## GS1 prefix source
All SSCC labels use `organizations.gs1_company_prefix` from the organizations table (02-settings). Always read from organizations table; do not store in env config or code constants.

## Implementation contract
1. `/(shipping)/labels/sscc/page.tsx` renders sscc_labels_queue_page (224-314): table of recent ssccs (sscc, shipment, box, printer, status, generated_at, printed_at, last_error). Filter by status.
2. `sscc_label_preview_component` (317-336) — small preview Card with mod-10 verification badge (consumer of T-019 verifySscc).
3. `sscc-preview-reprint-modal.tsx` (modals.jsx:702-739) — confirms reprint reason + calls reprintSscc Server Action (T-020/T-019).
4. Known bug fix BL-SHIP-07 (Bulk SSCC reprint single-label; spec mentions bulk ZPL job) — add bulk-select checkbox + Reprint Selected button (P1 stub allows up to 10 at once).
5. Permission: `ship.pack.close` for reprint; `ship.dashboard.view` for read.
6. Four states + i18n `shipping.labels.sscc.*`.

## Prototype parity
Verify against pack-screens.jsx:224-314 (queue), :317-336 (preview), modals.jsx:702-739 (reprint). Do not paste JSX wholesale.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/labels/sscc/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/labels/sscc/_components/sscc-queue-table.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/_components/sscc-label-preview.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/_modals/sscc-preview-reprint-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/labels/sscc/__tests__/sscc-queue-table.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/messages/en/shipping.json [modify]
- apps/web/messages/pl/shipping.json [modify]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/pack-screens.jsx [ref]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/modals.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given sscc_labels_queue_page renders, when compared to pack-screens.jsx:224-314, then header + filter + 7-col table + bulk-select column match — RTL + Playwright screenshot.
2. Given a row's sscc fails mod-10 verifySscc, when the preview component renders, then it shows a red badge with 'mod-10 mismatch' (V-SHIP-LBL-02).
3. Given user selects 10 ssccs and clicks Reprint Selected, when modal submits, then 10 reprint jobs are enqueued (bulk-reprint per BL-SHIP-07 fix).
4. Given user lacks ship.pack.close, when page renders, then Reprint button is hidden.
5. UI closeout includes Playwright trace + screenshots per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY; Playwright fallback documented if unavailable.

## Test strategy
- RED: RTL asserting parity + mod-10 badge + bulk reprint + permission gate + four states.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run sscc-queue-table.test.tsx`.
- Playwright `apps/web/e2e/shipping-sscc-queue.spec.ts`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not import @radix-ui/react-dialog outside packages/ui.
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim.
- Do not perpetuate BL-SHIP-07.
- Do not compute mod-10 client-side (call T-019 verifySscc Server function only).
- Do not regress accessibility.

pipeline_inputs.description: SHIP-019 SSCC Labels Queue page + preview component + reprint modal; BL-SHIP-07 bulk reprint fix.
pipeline_inputs.details: Bulk reprint allows up to 10 at once in P1. mod-10 verifySscc called server-side (T-019).
out_of_scope: Do not implement printer health monitoring.
acceptance_criteria: Given sscc_labels_queue_page renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/pack-screens.jsx:224-314, then header + filter + 7-col table + bulk-action toolbar match prototype (structural parity checklist); GS1 prefix sourced from organizations.gs1_company_prefix (02-settings).
Given a row's sscc fails mod-10, when preview component renders, then it shows red badge 'mod-10 mismatch' (V-SHIP-LBL-01).

Given user selects 10 ssccs and clicks Reprint Selected, when modal submits, then 10 reprint jobs enqueued (BL-SHIP-07); AND given user lacks ship.pack.close, when page renders, then Reprint button hidden.
UI closeout includes Playwright trace + screenshots per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY; Playwright fallback documented if unavailable.
test_strategy: RED: RTL parity + mod-10 badge + bulk reprint + permission gate + four states.
